creator: dwhite@gumbysoft.com
text:
Further investigation shows a potential routing problem at the far end. 
The site does work on my colo machine and I'm told it works on freefall. 
I'll have our company's network folk poke at it. I do remember having 
problems with this mirror at BSDCan though.

-- 
Doug White                    |  FreeBSD: The Power to Serve
dwhite@gumbysoft.com          |  www.FreeBSD.org
